    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AdminMenuOptions
     
    AdminStaff
    Represents an administrative staff member in the university events app.
    Booking
    Represents a booking made by a Student for a particular Performance in the events app.
    BookingController
    Controller responsible for booking-related operations in the events app.
    BookingStatus
     
    Controller
    Abstract base class for all controllers in the events app.
    EntertainmentProvider
    Represents an entertainment provider (EP) in the university events app.
    EPMenuOptions
     
    Event
    Represents an event in the university events app.
    EventPerformanceController
    Controller responsible for event and performance-related operations in the events app.
    EventType
     
    GuestMenuOptions
     
    MenuController
    The MenuController presents role-specific menus to the user (guest, student, entertainment provider, or admin staff) and routes the chosen option to the appropriate specialised controller.
    Performance
    Represents a single scheduled performance of an Event in the university events app.
    PerformanceStatus
     
    Student
    Represents a student user in the university events app.
    StudentMenuOptions
     
    StudentPreferences
    Holds the preferences for a Student user.
    TextUserInterface
    A text-based (console) implementation of the View interface for the university events app.
    User
    Abstract base class representing a user of the university events app.
    UserController
    Controller responsible for user-related operations in the events app.
    View
    Interface defining the contract for all user interface implementations in the events app.
